title: USDA forecasts winter wheat production down in 2020, Releases new data on previously unharvested corn and soybean acreage in four states
summary: U.S. farmers are expected to produce 1.25 billion bushels of winter wheat this year, according to the Crop Production report released today by the USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS). In NASS’ first winter wheat production forecast for 2020, production is expected to decrease 4% f...
